3384	The proof of \cref{lem:pullback_tensor_iso_unit} bottoms out in the single morphism equation
3385	labelled the \emph{unit square} below. Its proof is a telescope across three nested adjunction
3386	layers (sheafification, presheaf pullback--pushforward, sheaf pullback--pushforward). This
3387	subsection isolates the load-bearing intermediate identities as named lemmas so each can be
3388	discharged independently, then assembles them.

3391	\(\varphi = f.\mathtt{toRingCatSheafHom}\), \(\varphi' = \varphi.\mathrm{hom}\). Let \(a_X, a_Y\)
3392	denote sheafification of presheaves of modules on \(X\), \(Y\); \(\mathbf{1}^{\mathrm{p}}\) the
3393	presheaf monoidal unit; \(F = \mathtt{pullback}\,\varphi'\) the presheaf pullback;
3394	\(\eta\,F : F.\mathrm{obj}\,\mathbf{1}^{\mathrm{p}} \to \mathbf{1}^{\mathrm{p}}\) its oplax unit
3395	comparison; and \(\varepsilon(G)\) the lax unit comparison of a lax monoidal functor \(G\). The
3396	isomorphisms \(\mathtt{pullbackValIso}\,f\,\mathcal{O}_X\) and \(\mathtt{sheafifyUnitIso}\) are
3397	the file's comparison morphisms relating the sheaf-level pullback value to the sheafification of
3398	the presheaf-level pullback. Write
3399	\(\mathtt{sheafCounit}_\bullet = (\mathtt{sheafificationAdjunction}\,(\mathbf{1}_{\bullet.\mathtt{ringCatSheaf}.\mathrm{val}})).\mathrm{counit}\).
